event.title: Operation: Easter Egg
event.subtitle: The Skittelling!
event.tagline: You've been summoned to the meadow!
event.footerTagline: An R&R Production — Hopping into Spring!

steps.text: Hop to it — find YOUR eggs!
steps.detail: Every bunny has their own color — sniff out only yours!

steps.text: Spot a green or pink-top egg? Snatch it up!
steps.detail: Green eggs are tasks, pink-top eggs are power-ups — any player can grab them!

steps.text: Hop back when the hunting horn sounds!
steps.detail: The Great Hunt lasts 15 hops of the clock — then scurry home!

steps.text: The Bunny Bazaar — trade your task eggs!
steps.detail: 5 minutes to wheel and deal with fellow bunnies (no peeking!)
Score multipliers, bonus Skittles, and wild springtime twists!

steps.text: Crack 'em open — count your rainbow loot!
steps.detail: Smash those shells and tally up your Skittles treasure!

steps.text: Task egg time — silly spring challenges!
steps.detail: Complete tasks for bonus Skittles (prepare for some egg-streme embarrassment!)
Most Skittles wins — eternal egg-hunting glory awaits!

specialEggs.label: 🌱 Green Egg = Mystery Task!
specialEggs.desc: All green eggs are task challenges — crack it open to discover your dare!

specialEggs.label: ⚡ Pink-Top Egg = Power-Up!
specialEggs.desc: Pink top (hot or light) with a colored bottom — each color combo is a different power-up!

rules.text: The Great Hunt Lasts 15 Hops of the Clock!
rules.detail: When the clock runs out, even the speediest bunny has to stop hopping!

rules.text: Don't Wander Beyond the Bunny Trail!
rules.detail: If you can't see the meadow, you've hopped too far, little bunny!
Hop after your own color eggs plus any green or pink-top treasures you spot!
No snatching eggs from another hunter's trail, and no whispering where the eggs are hiding — that's fowl play! 🐔
Found an egg? Take it or leave it — no sneaky re-hiding or bunny business!

rules.text: Hop Back to the Nest When the Horn Sounds!
rules.detail: When the hunting horn blows, scurry back to base like a bunny who heard a fox!
Green eggs are tasks, pink-top eggs are power-ups — trade wisely at the Bunny Bazaar!

items: Do your best chicken impression for 10 seconds 🐔
Hop like a bunny across the group circle 🐇
Speak in a British accent for the next 2 minutes 🎩
Do 5 jumping jacks while singing "Happy Birthday" 🎶
Make up a 4-line poem about eggs on the spot 📝
Serenade another player with "Here Comes Peter Cottontail" 🎤
Do 10 bunny hops while clucking like a chicken 🐔🐇
Do your best impression of another player — group guesses who! 🎭
Perform a dramatic reading of a text from your phone as Shakespeare 🎭📱
Let the group pick a dance move you must do for 30 seconds 💃
Perform a 30-second interpretive dance of an egg hatching 🥚💃
Let another player give you bunny face paint (washable marker) 🐰🎨
Do a full minute of stand-up comedy about Easter 🎤😂
Act out a scene where you're a chicken defending your eggs from a fox 🐔🦊
Post a bunny-ear selfie to your Instagram story 📸🐰
Call a friend/family member and convince them you've become a chicken (1 min) 📞🐔
Let the group compose a haiku about you, then recite it dramatically 📜🎭

powerups.name: Double Down
powerups.description: Double the Skittles from your 3 highest-value eggs!

powerups.name: Egg Swap
powerups.description: Force a trade: give 1 of your eggs, take 1 of theirs (blind pick)!

powerups.name: Bonus Haul
powerups.description: Get 5 bonus Skittles, no strings attached!

powerups.name: Task Dodge
powerups.description: Cancel one of your task eggs — you don't have to do it!

powerups.name: Task Reassign
powerups.description: Give one of your task eggs to another player!
